title: Multi-Agent Handoff Pattern Catalog
description: Canonical MAHP composition-pattern and rule catalog. This surface defines no transport, queue, broker, retry runtime, or authorization engine.

patterns.summary: One emitter hands off to one receiver in ordered sequence.
One emitter fans work out to multiple receivers that share a grouping identifier.
Multiple prior envelopes converge into a merge-oriented receiving step using a shared grouping identifier.
Independent handoffs proceed in parallel without implied merge semantics.
No explicit composition pattern is declared.

validationRules.summary: applied_steps with execution_status verified require verification_reference.
provenance_chain must be non-empty and include an origin entry.
fan_out_group_id is required when composition_pattern is fan-out or fan-in.
open_gaps with severity blocking should force BLOCKED receiver handling.
validationRules.implementationNote: Documented as receiver-side contract semantics only in this slice; no runtime receiver enforcement is implemented.

validationRules.summary: state_claim_status observed requires at least one verified applied step.
emitter.execution_status must be applied or verified to emit.
